name: Euromonitor International
description: Euromonitor International offers an award-winning syndicated market research database that provides detailed data and analysis on industries and consumers, covering 1200 cities and 210 countries. Their methodologies combine data science with on-the-ground research, helping clients understand market dynamics and identify opportunities for successful product launches.

name: Hansa Research
description: The company is a leading consumer insights and market research firm in India, known for its customer-centric approach that combines expertise and technology to provide strategic insights for business growth.

name: Mintel
description: Mintel offers comprehensive market research solutions, utilizing innovative AI to provide instant insights into global product trends and consumer preferences. Their expertise helps industry leaders stay ahead by delivering reliable data and in-depth analysis on new products and market opportunities.

name: Market Research Engine
description: The company specializes in market research, utilizing advanced technologies to enhance data accuracy and provide custom research services that support strategic decision-making. With a strong track record of over 3,500 projects and partnerships with 1,700+ enterprises, they deliver precise data and actionable insights, enabling clients to gain a competitive edge through high-quality market intelligence.

name: GfK
description: GfK offers extensive market research expertise, combining advanced analytics and comprehensive consumer insights to empower brands with trusted market intelligence. Their focus on innovation and data-driven strategies equips businesses to make informed financial decisions.

name: Industry Research Biz
description: Industry Research is a service provider that specializes in market research and business intelligence, offering both custom and syndicated research reports that analyze the latest market trends. Their detailed insights into market movements support businesses in strategic planning and competitive analysis, enabling informed decision-making.

name: Unimrkt Research
description: Unimrkt Research is a prominent market research company that conducts multi-industry research across 90 countries and offers extensive market research solutions. Their services include primary research, in-depth interviews, and focus group discussions, ensuring valuable insights to help businesses grow.

name: A Global Market Research
description: Global Market Research is a specialized service provider that offers comprehensive market research data, focusing on delivering factual insights that aid decision-makers in strategic planning for global expansion. Their expertise helps businesses establish a solid foundation for their market research needs.

name: MMR Research
description: MMR is a global provider of market research and innovation solutions, specializing in sensory science and consumer insights. With expertise in both qualitative and quantitative research methodologies, MMR enhances brand experiences across various sectors, making it a valuable resource for effective market insights.

name: Decipher Market Research
description: The company is a market research firm that offers a wide range of services, including syndicated and customized research, aimed at addressing specific client needs. Their expert team employs advanced methodologies to provide detailed reports and insights into market growth and industry analysis.
